race.comment: EXORBITANT MISS (7) thereabouts of late and hard fit for this. Kept finding in the heavy conditions with a creditable on-pace fifth over 1600m at Narromine. Winning rider hops back on and can get the better of these from the draw. BONCAPO (3) two runs for the new yard have been excellent and has the upside to get over from the awkward gate. Returned good figures from back in the field with an unlucky second over 1400m at Warren. Ready for this trip and winning apprentice retains the ride. DUNWITHYA (1) slow maturing type who will keep improving as he gets out in trip. Taken to the front first-up and showed plenty of fight with a handy fifth over 1650m at Moruya. Has the speed to get over from the wide barrier. SIRIUS MOSS (12) has her hoof on the till at start seven and finds a winnable race at country level. Slow into stride with a closing second to Satono Jasmine over 1600m at Gosford. That form has been franked and is sure to be thereabouts.
